chef_text: Executive Chef Brie Lumière builds each dish around the idea of illumination, revealing the full potential of an ingredient through precision, contrast, and clarity. Combining inspiration from the generosity from the land and sea, she hones in on sharpening flavors, refining textures, and composing plates that allow each ingredient to be seen, tasted, and understood.
hero_title: Celestial in spirit. Precise in execution.
story_text: Luminary is an approachable,  fine-dining experience with rustic textures and celestial inspiration. Guided by the vision of our founder, John Luminary, here our seasonally driven menu is informed by the surrounding environment, forest, field, and stream
hero_description: Through thoughtful technique and carefully sourced ingredients, each dish is designed to reveal depth, contrast, and luminous discovery.
